title: linagrostis alpina
intro: Linagrostis alpina, also known as alpine brome or alpine brome grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). It is native to high-altitude mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Linagrostis alpina include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and support respiratory health, and it can be prepared as a tea or tincture for use in herbal remedies.
